name: @cairn/core
description: The Cairn engine — files, gates, prompts, agents — shared by every skin

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/gates.test.js dist/test/files.test.js dist/test/parse.test.js dist/test/steps.test.js dist/test/agents.test.js dist/test/coordinator.test.js dist/test/coordinator-regressions.test.js dist/test/coordinator-parallel-safe.test.js dist/test/coordinator-final.test.js dist/test/coordinator-recovery.test.js dist/test/bounded-provider.test.js dist/test/bounded-messages-fetch.test.js dist/test/bounded-broker.test.js dist/test/concurrent-activation.test.js dist/test/concurrent-run-review.test.js dist/test/concurrent-run-faults.test.js dist/test/concurrent-run.test.js
